positive: A whimsical forest scene illustration, viewed from a slightly elevated angle, featuring glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, floating geometric orbs, and stylized woodland animals (fox, deer, rabbit) rendered in thick, clean silhouettes. The composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, maximizing negative space for clean apparel printing. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, burnt orange, and creamy ivory. Style should be modern graphic design, combining elements of Art Deco linework with natural whimsy, with strong contrast between the dark background and luminous subjects. Minimal shading, high flat color presence, vector graphic style, suitable for screen printing.
